parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  company_name,
  website,
  country,
  industry,
  source,
  source_url,
  search_query,
  page_title,
  page_snippet,
  raw_data,
  candidate_status,
  relevance_score,
  review_notes,
  reviewed_at
FROM candidate_leads
WHERE candidate_status IN ($1, $2)
ORDER BY reviewed_at DESC NULLS LAST, relevance_score DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT $3;

INSERT INTO leads (
  company_name,
  website,
  country,
  industry,
  source,
  status,
  notes,
  raw_data
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7,
  jsonb_build_object(
    'candidate_lead_id', $8::uuid,
    'source_url', $9,
    'search_query', $10,
    'page_title', $11,
    'page_snippet', $12,
    'candidate_status', $13,
    'candidate_relevance_score', $14,
    'candidate_review_notes', $15,
    'candidate_raw_data', COALESCE($16::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb)
  )
)
ON CONFLICT (website) WHERE website IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  company_name = EXCLUDED.company_name,
  country = EXCLUDED.country,
  industry = EXCLUDED.industry,
  source = EXCLUDED.source,
  notes = EXCLUDED.notes,
  raw_data = leads.raw_data || EXCLUDED.raw_data,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING
  id AS promoted_lead_id,
  $8::uuid AS candidate_lead_id,
  company_name,
  website,
  score AS lead_score,
  grade,
  CASE
    WHEN grade = 'A' OR score >= 80 THEN 'high'
    WHEN grade = 'B' OR score >= 50 THEN 'medium'
    ELSE 'low'
  END AS priority;

UPDATE candidate_leads
SET
  promoted_to_lead_id = $1::uuid,
  candidate_status = $2,
  reviewed_at = NOW(),
  review_notes = CONCAT(
    COALESCE(review_notes, ''),
    CASE WHEN COALESCE(review_notes, '') = '' THEN '' ELSE ' | ' END,
    $3
  )
WHERE id = $4::uuid
  AND candidate_status IN ($5, $6)
RETURNING
  $7 AS company_name,
  $8::integer AS lead_score,
  $9 AS grade,
  $10 AS priority,
  promoted_to_lead_id AS promoted_lead_id,
  id AS candidate_lead_id,
  candidate_status;
